messages.content:
Hello! I’m the AI Technical Proposal Architect for Elvoria Tech. We help founders like you turn innovative ideas into scalable, AI‑first products using a modern stack—Next.js, NestJS, AWS Lambda, Kubernetes, and more.

If you’d like to explore how we could build a solution for your project, I’d be happy to set up a free 30‑minute consultation. Just let me know a bit about your idea and any specific goals you have, and we can dive into the details.
